← CI Dashboard

VI Browser

Viewer Select a VI from the sidebar View diff report → Open in new tab ↗ Drag to pan · Ctrl/⌘+scroll to zoom · ◀▶ to scroll a structure's cases
Select a VI to view its front panel and block diagram
🔒

VI Browser 2.0 needs a render token

The in-place renderer runs from a private image, so 2.0 only activates once this repository is provisioned with a render token. Until then, position-aware snapshots aren’t available here.

  1. Get a render token ↗ — opens GitHub with the read:packages scope preselected. You need access to the private render image.
  2. Paste the render token to connect

The token is sealed in your browser (libsodium) and saved as the TOIMAGES_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret — it never reaches this page’s host. Or switch to 1.0 for the classic view.

✓

Connected to the render image

Rendering…
